entityresolution.matchingworkflow.output: A list of `OutputAttribute` objects, each of which have the fields `Name` and `Hashed`. Each of these objects selects a column to be included in the output table, and whether the values of the column should be hashed.

entityresolution.matchingworkflow.output.Description: Enables the ability to hash the column values in the output.
A name of a column to be written to the output. This must be an `InputField` name in the schema mapping.
